metadata.name: Troubleshoot High Latency on a Live Stream

description: Viewers are complaining that a live stream has a very long delay (latency) compared to the real-world event.

nodes.task_description: Check the configuration of the streaming encoder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the encoder is using a very large segment size, which increases latency.

nodes.task_description: Check the CDN configuration for any caching settings that might increase latency.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the CDN settings are optimized for low latency.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the stream operator to adjust the encoder settings to use a smaller segment size to reduce latency.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions to the operator, and stream latency improves.
